compressed_context:
CTX: RENEWABLE-ELECTRICITY SUPPORT SCHEMES  
AUTHORITY: EC OR MEMBER-STATE NATIONAL-AUTHORITY  
SCHEME: ISSUE GREEN-CERTIFICATE=1 PER MWh RENEWABLE-ELECTRICITY  
PRODUCER-OBLIGATIONS: SUBMIT CERTIFICATES FOR COMPLIANCE OR SELL TO SUPPLIERS  
MARKET: CERTIFICATES TRADEABLE ∧ PRICE-FLOOR SET VIA PERIODIC AUCTIONS  
EFFECT: CERTIFICATE-TRADING⇒RENEWABLE-PRODUCTION↑  
IMPACT: FOSSIL-FUEL DEPENDENCE↓  
ALTERNATIVE: ES ∧ DE PREFER FEED-IN-TARIFF VS CERTIFICATE SCHEME  
CITATION: EU-DIRECTIVE-2002/xx/EC [ANNEX-I: RENEWABLE-SOURCES]  
OBSERVED: WTO-AB US-SHRIMP [WT/DS58/AB/R; PARAS 93,101]
